parameters.query:
INSERT INTO personal.apple_health_raw (
    metric_name,
    recorded_at,
    source,
    raw
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.metric_name }}',
    '{{ $json.recorded_at }}'::timestamptz,
    '{{ $json.source }}',
    '{{ $json.raw }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, recorded_at, source) DO UPDATE SET
    raw       = EXCLUDED.raw,
    synced_at = now();

workflow_name: Apple Health Sync - Health Auto Export
